validate.notes: Fixed solve.sh idempotency check. The original check 'grep -q 'pub exclude_newer: Option<ExcludeNewerValue>' was too broad - it matched exclude_newer fields in OTHER structs in the codebase. Changed to 'grep -A50 'pub struct ToolListArgs' | grep -q 'pub exclude_newer:'' which specifically checks for the field in the ToolListArgs struct. With this fix, the patch now applies correctly and all 10 tests pass (reward=1). NOP test correctly fails with 3 failures (reward=0) as expected for fail-to-pass tests.
